mapper.sql: id, code, name, category, color, vip_only, adult_only, enabled, discover_visible, discover_recommended, detail_visible, sort_order, created_at, updated_at

where.if: ( code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') )

mapper.select:
SELECT FROM app_tag_library
ORDER BY sort_order ASC, id ASC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT FROM app_tag_library WHERE id = #{id} LIMIT 1
SELECT FROM app_tag_library WHERE code = #{code} LIMIT 1
SELECT FROM app_tag_library WHERE enabled = 1 ORDER BY sort_order ASC, id ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE app_tag_library SET code = #{code}, name = #{name}, category = #{category}, color = #{color}, vip_only = #{vipOnly}, adult_only = #{adultOnly}, enabled = #{enabled}, discover_visible = #{discoverVisible}, discover_recommended = #{discoverRecommended}, detail_visible = #{detailVisible}, sort_order = #{sortOrder}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
